technical_replicate: Samples were measured in two technical replicates.
experimental_design: we allow for editing and library selection during 6 days before splitting the selected pool into treatment arms (control/DMSO vs. 2 nM PB).
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_technical_replicates: Samples were measured in two technical replicates.
number_of_samples: Since there is 1 biological replicate and no fractions, total samples = 1.
